summary: Applied vibrant tri-stop palette (deep blue → purple → magenta → orange) to all 6 legacy visual modes. For the 5 point-based modes (pointCloud, particleField, crystalField, ribbonField, flowRibbonField): replaced CPU-side HSL color generation with vibrant spatial gradient vertex colors via `computeVertexColors()`, added `aVertexColor` attribute and `uHasVertexColor` uniform, removed `hsl2rgb` from vertex shaders, and added soft luminance cap in fragment shaders to prevent bloom clipping. For fractalGrowthWireframe: replaced HSL coloring with GLSL-side `triStopGradient()` function in both wireframe and vertex-dot fragment shaders, with spatial position-based gradient sampling and luminance cap. Updated shader registry attribute lists and COMMON_UNIFORMS. All 2115 tests pass, build succeeds.
